data.current_summary: Get information about a sending pool.
data.current_description: Retrieve information about a sending pool, including its creation status and configuration parameters.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of sending pools for your project, including creation status and configuration parameters. Supports filtering and pagination via query parameters. Returns pool details such as status, configuration, and metadata. Sending pools are used to organize and manage email sending resources.

data.current_description: Retrieve the project settings including periodic reports.
